rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL PENNY VS. ANITA MULCAHY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 12, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANTs ANITA J. MULCAHY, CO-TRUSTEE OF THE ANNA C. LEWIS, MARY JO LEWIS, CO-TRUSTEE OF THE ANNA C. LEWIS, SUSANNE T. MULCAHY, TRUSTEE OF THE SUSANNE T., ANITA MULCAHY, CO-TRUSTEE OF THE JOSEPH P. GRASSO, MARY JO LEWIS, CO-TRUSTEE OF THE JOSEPH P. GRASSO and ANITA MULCAHY, TRUSTEE OF THE MULCAHY TRUST's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Motion for summary adjudication is GRANTED as to issues 2,4,5,6,7,8 for the reasons stated by the moving party. Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED as to issues 1 (triable issue of fact as to the ownership of 6/32 interest in the Property), 3 (triable issue of fact whether statute of limitations has run under the circumstances. See Epstein Declaration), 9 (triable issue of fact as to Defendants intent to perform. See Additional Material Facts). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOAN KONG VS. MICHAEL COMERFORD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Unlawful Detainer Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 12, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT MICHAEL COMERFORD's Motion To Quash Service Of Unlawful Detainer Summons DENIED. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that failure to allege personal service of the SFRO 37.9(i)(4) request, i.e. that lack of such allegations renders the Notice and Complaint insufficient to state a cause of action for unlawful detainer for the purposes of the Motion to Quash. = (501/REQ)
